title: Rhodonite Tools & Armor
description: Become overpowered with tools, armor and items to suit your needs! A better armor mod with flight, OP tools and cool abilities.
body:
Rhodonite is an end game armour and tools mod! The main use of this mod is the ability to become semi-overpowered when you near the end of the game. The main aim of the mod was to make an alternative to the draconic armor (from draconic evolution) which we felt is far too op for some cases! Rhodonite was created to be well balanced for all types and variations of modpacks, The armour powerful yet not too strong to ruin gameplay has special abilities and grants flight when the full suit is worn! 

I have finally found the time to update this mod to 1.20.1! (Currently in an alpha) Once we get the mod fully ported we will then begin a full rewrite and some new and exciting features!

A few things to note: 

- To gain flight you first need to make sure you are wearing all the rhodonite armor, You then need to find and add the Rhodonite Flight enchantment to the chest plate.
- If you are a pack developer and dont want the essenence of adventure maybe make a recipe for the flight enchantment book.

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52256d43a65044641fd1820c07490c040021a92.png)

![Rhodonite Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f6bb72aacda49f226fe895d74608549127e822c.png)

![Rhodonite Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fddfc6bfb118f7965bc69f5d2c4ef0caba51378.png)

![Fluorite Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87912f7dac136502c7e8c315beab2f5f31621f2b.png)

If you have any suggestions or feedback, Feel free to comment :) 

If you are a modpack developer, we would strongly suggest you change some recipes, as it could be easier to get these items in combination with other mods.

Todo list:  
- Re-add a working config.
- Re-add the ability for the heart to explode on crafting.
